games.headline: Miami 7, Washington 3 — Alcantara (W)
games.summary: Sandy Alcantara pitched 7.0 innings, allowing 3 earned runs with 5 strikeouts, leading Miami past Washington 7-3 at Nationals Park. Richard Lovelady lasted 0.2 innings, giving up 2 earned runs. Offensively for Miami: L.Hicks homered; K.Stowers homered with 2 RBI; H.Hernández homered with 2 RBI. J.Young went deep for Washington.

games.headline: Detroit 10, Tampa Bay 9 — Holton (W)
games.summary: Tyler Holton pitched 1.2 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 1 strikeouts, leading Detroit past Tampa Bay 10-9 at Tropicana Field. Griffin Jax lasted 4.0 innings, giving up 6 earned runs, 5 strikeouts, 1 walks. Offensively for Detroit: D.Dingler homered with 4 RBI; K.Carpenter homered with 2 RBI; R.Greene homered with 3 RBI. J.Caminero, R.Vilade went deep for Tampa Bay. Will Vest closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Texas 2, St. Louis 1 — deGrom (W)
games.summary: Jacob deGrom pitched 5.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 8 strikeouts, leading Texas past St. Louis 2-1 at Busch Stadium. Michael McGreevy lasted 6.0 innings, giving up 2 earned runs, 1 strikeouts, 2 walks. Offensively for Texas: E.Duran went 3-for-4, including 1 double with 1 RBI; N.Lopez went 2-for-4. M.Winn went deep for St. Louis. Jacob Latz closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Seattle 3, New York 2 (F/10)
games.summary: Gabe Speier pitched 1.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 2 strikeouts, leading Seattle past New York 3-2 at T-Mobile Park. A.J. Minter lasted 0.1 innings, giving up 0 earned runs, 1 strikeouts. Offensively for Seattle: J.Naylor homered; C.Emerson homered; C.Young went 2-for-3 with 1 RBI. J.Young, M.Semien went deep for New York. The teams needed 10 innings to decide it.

games.headline: Minnesota 9, Chicago 6 — Ryan (W)
games.summary: Joe Ryan pitched 6.0 innings, allowing 4 earned runs with 9 strikeouts, leading Minnesota past Chicago 9-6 at Target Field. David Sandlin lasted 4.0 innings, giving up 8 earned runs, 4 strikeouts, 4 walks. Offensively for Minnesota: T.Gray homered with 5 RBI; J.Bell went 2-for-4, including 1 double; T.Larnach went 2-for-3 with 1 RBI. M.Vargas, A.Benintendi went deep for Chicago.

games.headline: Milwaukee 16, San Francisco 2
games.summary: Chad Patrick pitched 1.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 1 strikeouts, leading Milwaukee past San Francisco 16-2 at American Family Field. Landen Roupp lasted 4.0 innings, giving up 8 earned runs, 4 strikeouts, 5 walks. Offensively for Milwaukee: C.Yelich went 3-for-5 with 2 RBI; J.Chourio went 2-for-4, including 1 double with 3 RBI. M.Chapman went deep for San Francisco.

games.headline: Colorado 9, Los Angeles 8 — Senzatela (W)
games.summary: Antonio Senzatela pitched 1.2 innings, allowing 0 earned runs, leading Colorado past Los Angeles 9-8 at Angel Stadium. Kirby Yates lasted 1.0 innings, giving up 1 earned runs. Offensively for Colorado: J.McCarthy homered; H.Goodman homered with 3 RBI; T.Johnston went 2-for-5 with 1 RBI. J.Siri went deep for Los Angeles.

games.headline: Kansas City 9, Cincinnati 2
games.summary: Luinder Avila pitched 5.0 innings, allowing 1 earned runs with 5 strikeouts, leading Kansas City past Cincinnati 9-2 at Great American Ball Park. Lyon Richardson lasted 1.0 innings, giving up 4 earned runs, 2 strikeouts, 2 walks. Offensively for Kansas City: J.Caglianone homered with 2 RBI; L.Thomas homered with 4 RBI; M.Massey homered. J.Bleday went deep for Cincinnati.

games.headline: Arizona 4, Los Angeles 1 — Clarke (W)
games.summary: Taylor Clarke pitched 1.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 2 strikeouts, leading Arizona past Los Angeles 4-1 at Chase Field. Emmet Sheehan lasted 6.1 innings, giving up 2 earned runs, 3 strikeouts. Offensively for Arizona: K.Marte homered with 2 RBI; N.Arenado homered; T.Troy homered. Paul Sewald closed it out for the save.
